title: XAIHT/Tlamatini

title: AronMav/opex
summary: OPEX — a self-hosted, Rust-based AI gateway where every layer is swappable without touching the core: agents in Markdown, tools in YAML, a provider in one line. 150+ providers, auto context windows for 5000+ models, multi-agent orchestration, channels, pgvector memory, encrypted vault. No vendor lock-in.

title: mrdushidush/claudette
summary: Your AI never leaves your laptop. Claudette is a personal AI assistant and coding agent that runs entirely on local hardware - REPL, fullscreen TUI, one-shot CLI, and a Telegram bot, all driving one local model through Ollama or LM Studio. No cloud brain. No API key. No subscription. No telemetry. One Rust binary.
